results.rendered_html:
ud-√dhū P. Ā. -dhūnoti and -dhunoti, -nute, to rouse up, shake up, move, cause to rise (dust),  RV. x, 23, 4 ;  MBh. ;  R. ;  Ragh. ;  VarBṛS.  &c.;
to throw upwards, lift up,  MBh. ;  Kathās.  &c.;
to kindle;
to disturb, excite,  MBh.  &c.;
to shake off, throw off;
to expel.

results.rendered_html:
uddhū 5 9 U.
1 To shake, move up, raise, throw up, wave (as a chawari); kairnoddhūtāni cāmarāṇi  K. 117 , 200 ;  Ku. 2. 29 ; uddhunīyāta satketūn  Bk. 19 8 ;  Ki. 5. 39. 
2 To shake or throw off;  Śi. 18. 8 , dispel, destroy (fig.), uddhūtapāpāḥ  Me. 55. 
3 To disturb, excite, rouse up.
